name: BS in Nursing
overview: Prepares students to become licensed nurses through classroom instruction and intensive hospital duty.
core_subjects: Anatomy and Physiology|Fundamentals of Nursing|Pharmacology|Community Health Nursing|Medical-Surgical Nursing
pros: High demand locally and abroad|Clear licensure path (PNLE)|Deeply meaningful patient-facing work
cons: Physically and emotionally demanding|Shift work including nights and holidays|Board exam pressure

name: BS in Civil Engineering
overview: Covers the design, construction, and maintenance of infrastructure such as roads, bridges, and buildings.
pros: Strong job market driven by infrastructure projects|Licensed profession with clear career ladder|Tangible results you can point to
cons: Heavy math and physics load|Licensure exam required|Site work can mean long field hours

name: BS in Computer Science
overview: Focuses on programming, algorithms, and the theory behind software systems.
core_subjects: Data Structures and Algorithms|Discrete Mathematics|Operating Systems|Software Engineering|Machine Learning Basics
pros: High-paying and remote-friendly career paths|No licensure exam required|Constantly evolving and creative problem solving
cons: Requires sustained self-study|Can be sedentary|Fast-changing tools demand lifelong learning

name: BS in Information Technology
overview: Centers on applying computing systems to business needs: networks, databases, and systems administration.
core_subjects: Networking Fundamentals|Database Management|Web Systems|Information Assurance|Systems Integration
pros: Broad entry-level opportunities in BPO and IT firms|Practical hands-on skills|Certifications can substitute for experience
cons: Entry-level roles can start with support work|On-call duties for system issues|Requires continuous certification

name: BS in Accountancy
overview: Trains students in financial reporting, auditing, and taxation toward the CPA licensure exam.
core_subjects: Financial Accounting|Auditing and Assurance|Taxation|Cost Accounting|Accounting Information Systems
pros: Prestigious CPA track|Every business needs accountants|Stable and well-compensated profession
cons: Very demanding board exam|Heavy workload during study and busy season|Detail-heavy routine work

name: BS in Business Administration
overview: Develops general management, marketing, and operations skills for corporate or entrepreneurial paths.
core_subjects: Principles of Management|Marketing Management|Business Finance|Human Resource Management|Operations Management
pros: Versatile degree across industries|Good springboard for entrepreneurship|Strong local job market
cons: Broad rather than specialized|Competitive entry-level market|Advancement often requires further study

name: BS in Elementary Education
overview: Prepares future elementary school teachers with foundations in pedagogy and child development.
core_subjects: Child and Adolescent Development|Principles of Teaching|Curriculum Development|Educational Technology|Practice Teaching
pros: Stable public-sector demand|LET licensure gives security of tenure|Direct positive impact on children
cons: Modest starting salaries|Licensure exam required|Large class sizes in public schools

name: BS in Secondary Education
overview: Prepares high school teachers with a chosen subject specialization such as math, science, or English.
core_subjects: Facilitating Learning|Assessment of Learning|Specialization Courses|Educational Technology|Practice Teaching
pros: Clear licensure path (LET)|Subject specialization deepens expertise|Strong demand for STEM teachers
cons: Modest starting salaries|Classroom management is demanding|Paperwork load

name: BS in Psychology
overview: Studies human behavior and mental processes; a common pre-med and HR pathway.
core_subjects: General Psychology|Experimental Psychology|Abnormal Psychology|Psychological Assessment|Industrial-Organizational Psychology
column11: pre-med|Growing mental health awareness increases demand|Deeply human subject matter
column12: Clinical practice requires graduate study|Entry-level pay varies widely|Emotionally heavy topics

name: BS in Architecture
overview: Combines art and engineering to design buildings and spaces, leading to architectural licensure.
core_subjects: Architectural Design|Building Technology|History of Architecture|Structural Concepts|Urban Planning
pros: Creative work with lasting physical output|Licensed profession|Growing construction sector
cons: Five-year program plus apprenticeship|Studio culture means long nights|Licensure exam required

name: BS in Multimedia Arts
overview: Covers graphic design, animation, video production, and interactive media.
core_subjects: Design Fundamentals|Digital Illustration|Motion Graphics|Video Production|Interactive Media
pros: Portfolio matters more than grades|Freelance and remote-friendly|Creative industries are growing
cons: Income can be irregular early on|Client revisions test patience|Requires self-marketing

name: BS in Hospitality Management
overview: Prepares students for hotel, restaurant, and events management with strong practicum components.
core_subjects: Food and Beverage Operations|Front Office Management|Events Management|Culinary Fundamentals|Tourism and Hospitality Marketing
pros: Clark and tourism corridor create local jobs|International placement opportunities|People-centered
column10: Shift work and holidays on duty|Entry-level pay is modest|Physically demanding service periods

name: BS in Tourism Management
overview: Focuses on travel operations, destination marketing, and tour management.
core_subjects: Tourism Planning|Travel Agency Operations|Destination Marketing|Airline Operations|Ecotourism
pros: Growing Philippine tourism industry|Travel exposure|Strong communication skill building
cons: Seasonal employment swings|Often starts in frontline roles|Industry sensitive to global events

name: BS in Criminology
overview: Studies crime, justice administration, and law enforcement toward the criminologist licensure exam.
core_subjects: Criminal Law|Criminalistics|Law Enforcement Administration|Forensic Science|Correctional Administration
pros: Clear path to PNP and public safety careers|Licensure profession|Strong sense of public service
cons: Physically demanding training|Risk inherent to law enforcement work|Rank-based salary progression

name: BS in Agriculture
overview: Covers crop science, animal production, and agribusiness — vital in Central Luzon's farm economy.
core_subjects: Crop Science|Animal Science|Soil Science|Agricultural Economics|Farm Mechanization
pros: Central Luzon is the country's rice bowl|Government support and scholarships|Agri-tech is modernizing fast
cons: Field work in all weather|Farm incomes fluctuate|Undervalued despite importance

name: BS in Entrepreneurship
overview: Builds the skills to start and grow a business, with students often launching real ventures before graduating.
core_subjects: Opportunity Seeking|Business Plan Development|Innovation Management|Financial Literacy|Digital Marketing
pros: You build your own venture in school|Skills transfer to any business role|Growing startup and MSME support ecosystem
cons: Income uncertainty as a founder|Requires high self-discipline|Family capital often assumed
